name: When a Parrot Knocked on the Window
original_name: When a Parrot Knocked on the Window
overview: Denny and Lera were once deeply in love, but time and circumstances tore them apart. Years later, a unexpected phone call brings them face-to-face, rekindling emotions they thought were long buried. As they navigate the complexities of their reunion, new challenges arise, threatening to keep them apart once again. Faced with new obstacles, they must find the strength to overcome the odds and rediscover the happiness they once shared.

trailers.title: 🌈❤️Premiere trailer 2024 "When a parrot knocked on the window" LGBT series 🌈❤️
